# livck Provider

Manage LIVCK monitoring, status pages and maintenances as code. Authentication uses an organization API token (`lvk_...`, plan Team or higher). create one in the console under *Settings > API Tokens* with the abilities the managed resources need (services.\*, statuspages.\* incl. publish, maintenances.\*).

## Example Usage

```terraform
terraform {
  required_providers {
    livck = {
      source  = "livck/livck"
      version = "~> 0.1"
    }
  }
}

# The token comes from the LIVCK_API_TOKEN environment variable.
# Mint one in the console: Settings > API Tokens (plan Team or higher).
provider "livck" {}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `api_token` (String, Sensitive) Organization API token (`lvk_...`). Prefer the `LIVCK_API_TOKEN` environment variable over hardcoding it.
- `endpoint` (String) API endpoint. Defaults to `https://api.livck.cloud`. Can also be set via the `LIVCK_ENDPOINT` environment variable.
